title: Luxembourg: enter the Diplomat for a Day competition
body: "The Diplomat for a Day competition is a joint initiative by the British and Canadian embassies that aims to encourage young women and girls to become leaders and advocates for change. If you win the competition, you will be invited to spend a day with the embassies in Luxembourg, shadowing senior leaders and learning about the work of a diplomat. You will also be able to take part in activities and discussions on the importance of equal rights for women.  Why you should enter this competition  Women and girls represent half of the world’s population and therefore also half of its potential. Today there are too few women in international diplomacy, including women from under-represented ethnic or social-economic backgrounds. Women are not represented at parity in political and business sectors. To end this underrepresentation, we must ensure equality of opportunity and equitable outcomes for everyone. This is why we, Canada and the United Kingdom, are working to increase opportunities for women and girls around the world.  Eligibility  Young women and girls are entitled to enter this competition if they are:   resident in Luxembourg; enrolled in high school in Luxembourg; between the ages of 16 and 19 or turn 16 in 2026; and are proficient in English.   You must have your parent or legal guardian’s consent to apply. No fees are required to enter this competition.  How to enter  To enter, you must answer the following question:  What positive change would you like to see to ensure equal rights for all women, including those who face additional barriers (e.g., disability, low income, etc.), and how can you contribute to making that change happen?  Record or write your answer and either:    upload your video on https://www.wetransfer.com. The video should be a maximum of 3 minutes, filmed in landscape mode. Please name the video in the format: ‘Last Name First Name - Diplomat for a Day 2026 Entry’   use diplomatforadayluxembourg2026@gmail.com as recipient    or   email your essay to diplomatforadayluxembourg2026@gmail.com. This should be a maximum of 500 words   You must also fill in the Diplomat for a Day 2026 application form and send it to diplomatforadayluxembourg@gmail.com.  Your video or essay must be in English, as communication during Diplomat For a Day will be entirely in English.  Deadline  Be aware of the following competition timings:   competition opens: Wednesday 7 January 2026 deadline for applications: Sunday 8 February 2026 at 23:59 CET winners contacted: 23 February 2026 Diplomat for Day activities: 10 March 2026    Apply for the competition by sending your completed  Diplomat For A Day Application Form  (ODT, 8.22 KB)  and your video or essay by 23:59 CET, 8 February 2026.   You should also read the Diplomat For A Day 2026  Terms and Conditions  (ODT, 10 KB) before you enter. "
